understandNonBinarity.title: Understand non-binarity
understandNonBinarity.nonBinaryDefinitionText: A non-binary person is someone who does not fully, always and/or exclusively identify as male or female, and non-binarity is the concept of this.
understandNonBinarity.imageAlt: Illustrative image of a heart with non-binary pride colors

whatWeDid.title: What we have done so far

ourHistory.title: Our history
ourHistory.description: The <highlight>Brazilian Non-Binary Articulation (ABRANB)</highlight> brings together <highlight>non-binary people</highlight> from different regions in a <highlight>horizontal organization</highlight>. We work with both thematic groups and state-specific groups to <highlight>carry out initiatives relevant to the non-binary community</highlight>, such as taking steps to improve access to documents and healthcare.

agendaSummary.title: Agenda Summary
agendaSummary.description-1: Together, we built a summarized list of necessary and specific demands regarding our diverse community, based on consultations in a non-binary forum (3 thousand people) and internal discussions within the coalition (170 people).
agendaSummary.description-2: Some urgent topics that need to be discussed:

topics.topic-1: Access to civil registration with recognized non-binary identity
topics.topic-2: Access to education free from cisnormativity/cisgender supremacy
topics.topic-3: Access to personal and collective recognition in the Brazilian language
